case_title: TANG, LAI HING VS OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S IFP SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
PLTF COPY OF FEE WAIVER, WHICH WAS DENIED BY THE COMMISSIONER,& REQUEST FOR PYMT OF FILING & MAIL- ING WAS MAILED ON 9/6/96. MUST SUBMIT $21.00 TOTAL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO CONNIE HO-MANAGER OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO. RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, LAI HING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE-CCP 116.231 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TANG, LAI HING AS TO DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1996 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A FEE WAIVER HAS BEEN DENIED BY THE COMMISSIONER.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
FILING FEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $15.00 PAID AND ENTER UNDER MISCELLENOUS TRANSACTION #5909X114.
